ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., instructions, image-multi-choice) */,
  "trial_index" INTEGER /* Index of the trial */,
  "time_elapsed" INTEGER /* Time elapsed during the trial */,
  "internal_node_id" TEXT /* Internal node ID of the trial */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the trial */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., in progress, completed, canceled) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the trial was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_types" (
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial type */,
  "trial_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the trial type */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the trial type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "birds" (
  "bird_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bird species */,
  "bird_name" TEXT /* Name of the bird species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the bird species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the bird species */,
  "physical_characteristics" TEXT /* Physical characteristics of the bird species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the bird species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the bird species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the bird species */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the bird species */,
  "migration_patterns" TEXT /* Migration patterns of the bird species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the bird species */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image of the bird species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bird_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bird_families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bird family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the bird family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bird family */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the bird family */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the bird family */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the bird family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bird_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bird class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the bird class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bird class */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the bird class */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the bird class */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the bird class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_birds" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "bird_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bird species used in the trial */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response provided by the user during the trial */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to provide the response */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the response (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id", "bird_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Time spent by the user on the trial */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the trial was conducted */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the trial was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewing_history" (
  "viewing_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewing history entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "page_index" INTEGER /* Index of the page */,
  "viewing_time" INTEGER /* Time spent on the page */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the page */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time the page was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewing_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewing_history_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response provided by the user */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the response */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to provide the response */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the response (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internal_nodes" (
  "internal_node_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each internal node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the internal node */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the internal node */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the internal node */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the internal node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("internal_node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decision_nodes" (
  "decision_node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision node */,
  "internal_node_id" TEXT /* ID of the internal node */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision made at the node */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the decision node */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the decision node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "page_index" INTEGER /* Index of the page */,
  "page_content" TEXT /* Content of the page */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the page */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pages_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content entry */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the page */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the content entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the content entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_content_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)
